content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Market is flat at index level but with significant rotation — FMCG, Pharma, Power, PSU Banks showing strength while IT is collapsing (INFY down pre-results, HCLTECH at 52w low). India VIX at 18.48 is elevated. Book is 79% deployed with minimal room for new entries. Priority is position management: set stop-losses on all 10 CNC holdings (currently all at 0.00 which is a major risk gap) and trail aggressively on winners.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24130,
      "nifty_resistance": 24310
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "new_target": 90.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater -4.5% but thesis intact: Q4 blowout (PAT +35% YoY, NNPA 0.13%), HDFC Sec TP Rs 90, PSU bank sector strong. Setting SL at 72 (below recent swing low 70.30) to avoid further downside; target 90 aligns with analyst TP. R:R ~2.3:1 from entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong +10.5% gap up post Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA 0.93% first time below 1%). Trailing SL to 955 to lock in gains (near entry breakeven). Target 1100 leaves room before 52w high 1141. Analyst TP Rs 1,143 supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; -0.7% but trend intact. SL 119 below 20DMA 121.92 with buffer; target 135 conservative given profit-booking phase post-Akshaya Tritiya. Core hedge position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+3.2% winner on breakout above prior 52w high 1640. Trail SL to 1620 (breakeven minus small buffer, below today's low area). Target 1820 for ~10% upside. Q4 results May 13 is next catalyst. Power cluster getting crowded — must cap here."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (revenue +22.6%, PAT +27.2%), fresh 52w high post-results. SL 1365 just below entry (tight given sell-on-news risk at P/E 70+). Target 1500 conservative given valuation stretch."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results on Apr 27 is binary catalyst (4 days away). Strong provisional numbers (advances +25%, deposits +23%). SL 1010 below today's low 1035 with buffer. Target 1150 before results — may exit ahead of event if momentum stalls."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "new_target": 755.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 29. USFDA audit cleared with only procedural observations. Pharma sector strong (+3% today, tariff reprieve). SL 655 below EMA9 646; target 755 aligns with MOFSL TP 750."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "new_target": 2520.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "FMCG defensive play ahead of Q4 results Apr 30. Entry 2372 barely in profit. SL 2290 below today's low; target 2520 below analyst mid 2500-2850. Tight management given Q3 showed PAT -30% YoY — event risk high."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 435.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Base-on-base breakout, relative outperformer. ESG upgrade + EDF nuclear MoU + NGEL expansion. SL 388 below support 389/20DMA 378 buffer; target 435 near analyst upper band 440. Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 201.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 6,
      "reasoning": "At all-time high after +35% April rally. Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event. SL 201 below today's low 212 is too wide; setting 201 just under recent consolidation. Target 235 modest. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER+ADANIPOWER+NTPC) already ~17% of book — no adds."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 72.00,
      "reasoning": "Underwater but thesis intact. Protective SL set. No adds."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Big gap up, trail SL to lock in gains. Let winner run toward 1100."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, maintain with protective stop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing to near breakeven; breakout above 1640 validates target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL given rich valuation. Ride Q4 momentum with defined risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1010.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 27 binary — may exit ahead if momentum stalls."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 655.00,
      "reasoning": "Pharma tailwind intact; Q4 Apr 29 is next catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2290.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold into Apr 30 results with protective SL; exit ahead if shows weakness."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Base-on-base breakout structure intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 201.00,
      "reasoning": "Event risk Apr 29. No additions to power cluster."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DATAPATTNS (+18%), ADANIENSOL (+9.5%), ELECON, DEEPAKNTR are all parabolic gap-ups — chasing at these extensions is poor R:R. WIPRO buyback arbitrage at 250 is interesting but only 0.65% move so far. HCLTECH at 52w low may offer mean-reversion bounce but IT sector fundamentally broken today. INFY pre-results — strictly avoid until post-print. Will revisit tomorrow once dust settles and catalysts clarify.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — essentially fully loaded with only INR 14k remaining deployable. NO new entries today regardless of setup quality — deployment hysteresis rule applies. CRITICAL: all 10 positions had zero stop-loss recorded — I've set protective SLs on every position this tick, which was the biggest risk gap in the book. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + ADANIPOWER + NTPC + small GOLDBEES proxy) needs monitoring — currently at manageable levels. Heavy event-driven week ahead: AUBANK Apr 27, ADANIPOWER/GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30 — will reassess and likely book profits/reduce ahead of these events if setups weaken. Focus next sessions: tighten SLs as winners extend, exit laggards ahead of their earnings events."
}
